scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run deploy:worker && npm run deploy:web
scripts.deploy:worker: cd apps/worker && npm run validate && npx wrangler deploy
scripts.deploy:web: cd apps/web && npx wrangler pages deploy dist
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w web && cd apps/worker && npm run typecheck
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w web && cd apps/worker && npm run lint
scripts.validate: npm run typecheck && npm run lint
